category_sources: Official Watson docs describe monitoring time, projects, tags, reports, and CLI commands.
source_facts.description says Watson is a command-line tool to track time.
display_name_sources: Official Jazzband documentation and repository use Watson.
docs_sources: Official docs are built with MkDocs and include overview, installation, and user guide content.
source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site https://jazzband.github.io/Watson/.
repo_sources: Official Watson docs link to the GitHub source repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, and the official Jazzband project page lists Code repository: https://github.com/jazzband/Watson.
tags_sources: Official docs describe tracking projects and tags, generating reports, and installing the Python package td-watson.
